note: APPEND-ONLY. Does not overwrite runs/kanban.json (US-001..US-007) or runs/plan_final.md (US-101..US-1103). Fresh IDs: PHASE-012..014, US-1201+.

stories.title: Add app favicon and document head metadata
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN frontend/public has only .gitkeep WHEN favicon added+referenced THEN tab shows icon
GIVEN any route WHEN loaded THEN no /favicon.ico 404

stories.title: Fix column reorder not refreshing the DOM
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN reorder PATCH 200 WHEN drag completes THEN DOM order updates without refresh
GIVEN failed reorder WHEN error THEN optimistic rollback

stories.title: Render logout control wired to authStore.logout()
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN logout() exists WHEN control clicked THEN logout runs + redirect to login
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Fix mobile theme section blocked by BottomNav
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN <768px WHEN ThemeSwitcher open THEN not overlapped by BottomNav
GIVEN fixed BottomNav WHEN scroll bottom THEN padding-bottom = nav height

stories.title: Make left Sidebar collapsible
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN expanded WHEN toggle THEN collapses to rail
GIVEN state WHEN reload THEN persists
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Fix horizontal board scroll and modal overflow
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN many columns WHEN render THEN board scrolls horizontally in container
GIVEN modal WHEN open THEN constrained on-screen, scrollable
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Migration V21: create refresh_tokens store (reversible)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN at V20 WHEN V21 runs THEN refresh_tokens table+indexes exist
VERIFY reversible + validated on non-prod DB

stories.title: Backend: short-lived access token + refresh issuance/rotation
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN login WHEN response THEN <=15m access + persisted refresh
GIVEN valid refresh WHEN /auth/refresh THEN new access + rotate
GIVEN expired/unknown WHEN refresh THEN 401
VERIFY JUnit

stories.title: Backend: revoke refresh token on logout (revocation/denylist)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN session WHEN /auth/logout THEN revoked_at set
GIVEN revoked WHEN refresh THEN 401
GIVEN reused token WHEN presented THEN 401 + family revoked
VERIFY JUnit

stories.title: Frontend: silent token refresh + logout wired to endpoints
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN 401/pre-expiry WHEN call THEN refresh once + retry transparently
GIVEN logout WHEN run THEN /auth/logout + clear + redirect
GIVEN failed refresh WHEN occurs THEN redirect login (no loop)
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: INVESTIGATE & verify workspace backend
stories.scope_flag: may expand into US-1302 if backend gaps found (expected: none)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN WorkspaceController endpoints WHEN exercised THEN documented success/403
GIVEN gap WHEN found THEN schedule US-1302 else close it

stories.title: CONTINGENT: fix workspace backend gaps from US-1301
stories.scope_flag: activates only if US-1301 finds gaps
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN gaps recorded WHEN fixed THEN JUnit proves behavior
GIVEN no gaps WHEN triaged THEN close not-needed

stories.title: Workspace management UI: create / rename / delete
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN manage surface WHEN used THEN create/rename/delete with optimistic UI
GIVEN non-owner WHEN open THEN destructive disabled
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Workspace member-management UI (list/add/remove)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN workspace WHEN open THEN members listed
GIVEN add form WHEN submit email THEN 201 + list updates
GIVEN member row WHEN remove THEN DELETE + row gone
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Fix column color: allow re-opening picker to change set color
stories.scope_flag: investigation resolved DOWN: frontend-only, backend already supports repeat updates
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN color set WHEN menu open THEN picker available again
GIVEN new color WHEN confirm THEN PATCH columns/{id} + re-render
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Migration V22: add description to boards (reversible)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN at V21 WHEN V22 runs THEN boards.description nullable
VERIFY reversible + non-prod validated

stories.title: Backend: board description in model/request/response
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN Board+CreateBoardRequest WHEN updated THEN description accepted on create/update + in response
VERIFY JUnit

stories.title: Richer create-board modal: themed UI + description field
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN modal WHEN open THEN matches active theme tokens
GIVEN name+description WHEN submit THEN board created with description
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Extend theme token model for gradient/texture backgrounds
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN 3 flat themes WHEN extended THEN background token supports color|gradient|texture without breaking existing
VERIFY existing 3 themes unchanged desktop+mobile

stories.title: Add several new gradient/texture themes
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN extended model WHEN new themes added THEN appear in ThemeSwitcher + apply
GIVEN selected WHEN reload THEN persists
VERIFY contrast readable desktop+mobile

stories.title: Migration V23: add color field to cards (reversible)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN at V22 WHEN V23 runs THEN cards.color nullable free-form hex
VERIFY reversible + non-prod validated

stories.title: Backend: card color in model/request/response
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN card model+DTO WHEN updated THEN free-form hex accepted on PATCH + in response
GIVEN invalid hex WHEN submit THEN 422
VERIFY JUnit

stories.title: Free-form hex/color-wheel picker for columns AND cards
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN column WHEN picker open THEN any hex via wheel/input or preset -> PATCH headerColor
GIVEN card WHEN picker open THEN any hex -> PATCH color
GIVEN picker WHEN render THEN reuses theme tokens
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Migration V24: modules/tags + card_modules join (reversible)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN at V23 WHEN V24 runs THEN modules table + card_modules join + indexes
VERIFY reversible + non-prod validated; no impact on cards

stories.title: Backend: modules/tags CRUD + assign/unassign to cards
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN board WHEN POST module THEN created+listable; PATCH rename; DELETE detaches
GIVEN card WHEN assign/unassign THEN join updated + in response
VERIFY JUnit

stories.title: Backend: swimlane group-by config persisted per board
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN board WHEN set group-by none|assignee|priority|module THEN persisted + returned on load
GIVEN module group-by WHEN no modules THEN valid empty grouping
VERIFY JUnit

stories.title: Frontend: real swimlanes — group-by rendering with DnD assignment
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN group-by picked WHEN render THEN real horizontal lanes per group + None lane
GIVEN card dragged across lanes WHEN dropped THEN attribute updates+persists
GIVEN group-by WHEN reload THEN restored
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Migration V25: create issues table (child of story-cards, reversible)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN at V24 WHEN V25 runs THEN issues table with nullable parent_card_id FK + index
GIVEN no parent WHEN created THEN standalone persists
VERIFY reversible + non-prod validated

stories.title: Backend: issue CRUD + attach/detach to story-card (manual close)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN POST /issues WHEN called THEN standalone issue; GET lists+filters
GIVEN PATCH parent WHEN set/clear THEN attach/detach
GIVEN PATCH status closed WHEN called THEN closes; parent card close does NOT auto-close
VERIFY JUnit

stories.title: Frontend: create-issue UI, attach/detach UI, issues view
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN issues view WHEN load THEN lists issues + create
GIVEN story-card detail WHEN open THEN attach/detach + see attached
GIVEN issue WHEN close manually THEN status updates; no auto-close
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Migration V26: convert role strings to OWNER/ADMIN/MEMBER/VIEWER (reversible, data-safe)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN free-string roles WHEN V26 runs THEN normalized to enum set + CHECK/enum constraint
GIVEN owners WHEN migrated THEN OWNER assigned where determinable; VIEWER preserved
VERIFY reversible + non-prod validated; zero rows lost

stories.title: Backend: Role enum + central authorization policy across controllers
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN bare strings WHEN replaced THEN Role enum + central policy (extend BoardAccessPolicy / add WorkspaceAccessPolicy)
GIVEN each mutating controller WHEN request THEN policy enforced (VIEWER ro, MEMBER edit, ADMIN members, OWNER full)
VERIFY JUnit role x action matrix

stories.title: Backend: assign/authorize roles per workspace and per board (API)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN member WHEN PATCH role THEN changes (only OWNER/ADMIN; only OWNER grants OWNER)
GIVEN access grant/deny WHEN applied THEN policy honors immediately
VERIFY JUnit allowed+forbidden

stories.title: Frontend: user-management UI to view/assign roles and authorize access
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN workspace/board WHEN open THEN members+roles listed + change role
GIVEN insufficient role WHEN view THEN controls disabled per policy
GIVEN role change WHEN succeeds THEN capabilities update
VERIFY desktop and mobile
